pages.text: $(o)"There's a king in the sky. He doesn't speak; he signs in lightning."$()$(br2)Co-authored by the Storm School and ancient priesthood. The thunderstorm is the king's countersignature.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Force-set weather to $(l)thunderstorm$() for $(l)5 minutes$().$(br2)Within $(l)32 blocks$(), call lightning down on up to $(l)12$() random hostiles.$(br2)Cost: $(l)3600$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Quick weather toggle + AoE lightning. Watch out for charged creepers and Witch upgrades during the storm.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 3 Convergence$() or above.
